inline_comments.message: is this value hardcoded in the plugin? dont see it on k8s plugin config under oom - https://git.onap.org/oom/tree/kubernetes/dcaegen2/components/dcae-bootstrap/resources/config/k8s-plugin.json

The label name is fixed in the k8s plugin.  There's no real reason to make it configurable for the plugin.

The reason the label name is configurable for the healthcheck service is that we want to be able to use the container to support services other than DCAE.  (Specifically, for now, we want to support DCAE MOD, where we don't set the DEPLOY_LABEL at all.)
OKay. I assume if made configurable on the plugin, both healthcheck and bootstrap/k8splugin config may need to be sourced from global values.
